payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the newer current record. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so it should not be presented as the active memory.
payload.decision: Use mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman; filter out mem_old because it is superseded by the newer record.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall result prefers mem_new because it is the newer, non-superseded record for the same Sam/Goldman association; mem_old is excluded as outdated.

payload.intent: Explain why recall selected the newer memory for Sam from Goldman and excluded the older one as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman in the newer memory record.
An older memory record for Sam from Goldman exists but is superseded and should not be treated as current.

details: No superseded fact presented as current.

repair_options: If the older record is needed for audit/history, mark it explicitly as historical instead of current.
If a clearer identity match is required, add disambiguating attributes for Sam and Goldman.
